---
title: "Louisa Harriet Eyre Matcham"
---

## Louisa Harriet Eyre Matcham

### Description

daughter of George Matcham

### Biography

She married (1860) the Rev. Fortescue Purvis (d. 1885).  She was the younger and (in 1858) the only unmarried daughter of George Matcham (1789-1877) of Newhouse;  she was a first cousin of Alexander Montgomery Moore. [PB Nelson]

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 2nd1858

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
